title: Pennsic Mapper
description: Browse the Pennsic 53 (2026) camp map and build a shareable personal map of coloured, labelled pins, reached by a link.

dataSources.name: Official Pennsic LIII (2026) land map
dataSources.description: The base map is the official Pennsic War land map for Pennsic LIII (2026), a single 1648×2551 PNG (~570 KB) bundled at build time and served offline — never fetched at runtime. Captured 2026-07-03 from the official Pennsic War land-map site. In-image attribution: 'Map Created by Aakin, Updated by Genoveva, Marit, Tananda.' Supplied for direct use by the widget owner; see maintenance/README.md to refresh it for a future Pennsic.
